vocab.meaning: âm thanh hỗn tạp, chói tai
vocab.example: The city center is a constant cacophony of sirens, shouting, and construction work.

vocab.meaning: tiếng ồn xung quanh, âm thanh nền
vocab.example: I’ve grown so used to the ambient noise of the office that silence actually feels distracting.

vocab.meaning: tiếng hét chói tai, thét lên
vocab.example: The peaceful morning was suddenly interrupted by the piercing shriek of a car alarm.

vocab.meaning: tiếng nói chuyện râm ran không ngớt
vocab.example: Commuting on the bus means enduring the incessant chatter of fellow passengers every day.

vocab.meaning: tiếng máy móc kêu lạch cạch/ầm ĩ
vocab.example: Living next to a textile factory, the rhythmic clatter of machinery becomes part of your daily routine.

vocab.meaning: một sự tấn công dữ dội về âm thanh
vocab.example: Walking through the night market is a sonic onslaught of loud music and street vendors calling out.

vocab.meaning: tiếng bịch/bộp trầm đục (không rõ ràng)
vocab.example: From my apartment, I can often hear the muffled thud of my upstairs neighbor moving furniture.

vocab.meaning: âm thanh gây khó chịu, chói tai
vocab.example: The jarring sound of metal scraping against metal always sets my teeth on edge.

vocab.meaning: tiếng rè rè của dòng điện
vocab.example: In the dead of night, the only thing audible is the faint hum of electricity from the refrigerator.
The bass from the neighboring club is so powerful that it easily penetrates the walls of my bedroom.
